indications.text:
ZURNAI is indicated for the emergency treatment of known or suspected opioid overdose
induced by natural or synthetic opioids in adults and pediatric patients aged 12 years and older,
as manifested by respiratory and/or central nervous system depression.
ZURNAI is intended for immediate administrati...
